title: Measurement of neutron total cross section of Th in 0.008-0.1 eV at TMSR-PNS

x4freetext: 15 MeV electron accelerator
The photo-neutron source for the thorium
molten salt reactor (TMSR-PNS), the beam repetition
frequency is 13 Hz.
6LiI(ZnS) scintillator detector
5.899 m flight path
The total cross section of 16O from ENDF/B-VII.1 was
deducted from the total cross section of ThO2, and
the total cross section of Th was obtained.

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: Total uncertainty, including the error of
the sample purity and thickness, the fitting flight
distance, relative standard deviation of the total
cross section for 16O from ENDF/B-VII.l, and
experimental statistical error.

High purity (>99.99%) thorium oxide (ThO2) sample
was made by pressing and sintering process at 46 MPa
and 1800 degree, with a diameter of 5.00 cm,
thickness of 0.900 cm and density of 9.94 g/cm3.
